# Architecture — The Approach
*Generated by tech-lead-review · 2026-05-16*

## Data and Token Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph User["User Machine (workspace)"]
        AM[APPROACH.md\nconfig file]
        AT[approach-template.html\n~131KB canonical]
        AA[approach-artifact.html\nfilled artifact]
    end

    subgraph Agent["Cowork Agent (Claude)"]
        AR[approach_run\n~0.5KB instructions\n⚡ cheap]
        AGS[approach_get_skill\nper-section lazy load\n1–15KB each]
        AGT[approach_get_template\n⚠ DEPRECATED in Cowork\n~131KB response]
        WS[WebSearch\nresearch phase\n9+ concurrent batches]
    end

    subgraph Worker["Cloudflare Worker (mcp.missionbuilt.io)"]
        RT[approach_run tool\nreturns full SKILL.md\n🔴 15KB — should be 0.5KB]
        ST[approach_get_skill tool\nsection extractor]
        GT[approach_get_template tool\ninjects JSON into HTML\nreturns 131KB]
    end

    User -->|triggers 'run the approach'| AR
    AR -->|calls| RT
    RT -->|"🔴 returns full SKILL.md (15KB)\nshould return orchestration only"| Agent
    Agent -->|calls per phase| AGS
    AGS --> ST
    ST -->|returns section 1–15KB| Agent

    Agent -->|fires all search batches concurrently| WS
    WS -->|research results| Agent

    Agent -->|assembles| SCHEMA[APPROACH_DATA object\ncontact intel · plays · risks]

    subgraph PathA["Path A — Repeat Run (artifact exists)"]
        PA1[Grep artifact for script id=approach-data]
        PA2[Read ~10 lines offset+limit]
        PA3[Edit data block only]
        PA4[update_artifact]
        PA1 --> PA2 --> PA3 --> PA4
    end

    subgraph PathB["Path B — First Run (no artifact)"]
        PB1[Read approach-template.html in full\n⚠ 131KB — may be expensive]
        PB2[Write to approach-artifact.html]
        PB3[Edit __APPROACH_DATA__ placeholder]
        PB4[create_artifact]
        PB1 --> PB2 --> PB3 --> PB4
    end

    SCHEMA -->|artifact exists?| PathA
    SCHEMA -->|no artifact| PathB

    PathA --> AA
    PathB --> AA

    AA -->|registered with Cowork| Artifact[Cowork artifact panel\nlive HTML brief]

    style RT fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style AGT fill:#ffa07a,color:#fff
    style PB1 fill:#ffd700,color:#333
```

## Token Cost Table

| Operation | Cost | Frequency | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|
| `approach_run` (current) | ~15KB / ~4K tokens | Every trigger | 🔴 Should be ~0.5KB |
| `approach_run` (target) | ~0.5KB / ~125 tokens | Every trigger | After fix |
| `approach_get_skill` per section | 1–15KB / 250–4K tokens | On demand | Schema section largest |
| WebSearch batch (×9 concurrent) | ~variable | Once per run | Correct — parallel |
| Path A edit cycle | ~50 tokens | Every repeat run | Correct — cheap |
| Path B template Read | ~131KB / ~33K tokens | First run only | ⚠ Verify Read limit |
| `approach_get_template` | ~131KB / ~33K tokens | Deprecated | Don't call in Cowork |

## Design Notes

**What's working:**
- Path A (repeat run) is now correct — targeted Grep → Read → Edit pattern avoids large responses entirely.
- Security injection patterns (replacer function, `</script>` escape) are correct in `approach_get_template`.
- `getApproachSkillSection` boundary map covers all 6 sections cleanly.

**Critical gap:**
- `approach_run` returns the full SKILL.md (current state). This should be orchestration instructions only, with agents calling `approach_get_skill` per section as needed. This is the architectural mismatch between The Approach and The Warmup/Spotter.

**Render section boundary bug:**
- `render` section boundary ends at `## Summary line`, excluding it. Agents loading only `section:"render"` will silently skip the summary line output. Extend boundary to `## Editorial rules`.

**Path B:**
- Reads 131KB template via file Read tool. Whether this triggers Cowork's large-response offload behavior is unverified. Test before declaring it fixed.
